arts.ttl: Fenerbahce vs Man Utd: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: There's a feast of narratives on Thursday night as Fenerbahce take on Manchester United in the Europa League on Matchday 3 of the league phase. The winless United head into this fixture 21st in the league phase table, while the hosts are 13th with four points having beat Union Saint-Gilloise on Matchday 1.

arts.ttl: Two of the four Man Utd stars named and shamed by Jose Mourinho have left the club
arts.sum: Manchester United have made little progress since Jose Mourinho left the club under a dark cloud, with two of the players he publicly lambasted still playing for the Red Devils

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho shows Manchester United what they are missing during masterful press conference
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho was in his element as he reunited with English journalists in Istanbul, offering gifts, laughter and recommendations.

arts.sum: Man United will be hoping to build on Saturday's 2-1 win over Brentford when they face Jose Mourinho's Fenerbahce in the Europa League on Thursday evening.
